case_title: DANIEL CASTILLO VS. PHILIP PLATT et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-26-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
